title: Petrosimonia brachyphylla
taxonomy: Petrosimonia brachyphylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It belongs to the genus Petrosimonia, which is a group of succulent plants. The plant is native to the deserts and steppes of Central Asia. Petrosimonia brachyphylla is further classified as belonging to the order Caryophyllales, which includes other flowering plants such as cacti and carnations. The classification of Petrosimonia brachyphylla into its specific taxonomic ranks is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: Angiosperms, clade: Eudicots, clade: Caryophyllales, family: Amaranthaceae, genus: Petrosimonia, species: P. brachyphylla.
